case_title: FENDY HARDJOJO VS. JOHN DAVIS et al

DECLARATION OF SUSAN PARKINSON IN SUPPORT OF REQUEST FOR DEFAULT JUDGMENT BY CLERK FOR RESTITUTION OF PREMISES FILED BY PLAINTIFF HARDJOJO, FENDY
